title: >= 8.0.27 Error 1048 when updating row with empty_sql mode
description:
The problem is described below:

After doing an INSERT on a table with a NOT NULL field, without giving any value to one of such columns, and if this table has an insert trigger, an UPDATE throws error 1048 for MySQL 8.0.35.

It executes fine if you disconnect the session after the insert command and reconnect to do the UPDATE.

NOTES:

- If you remove the trigger, the issue does not happen.
- If you run FLUSH TABLES before the UPDATE, the issue does not happen.
- The trigger is BEFORE INSERT, so, weirdly, an UPDATE operation causes this.
- Reconnecting with the new session and default SQL_MODE does not cause this issue.
How to repeat:
mysql>  set SESSION sql_mode = 'STRICT_TRANS_TABLES,NO_ENGINE_SUBSTITUTION';
Query OK, 0 rows affected, 1 warning (0.00 sec)

mysql> CREATE TABLE `error_1048_test` (
  `c1` char(1) NOT NULL,
  `c2` char(1) NOT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.02 sec)

mysql> CREATE TRIGGER `error_1048_test_BEFORE_INSERT` BEFORE INSERT ON `error_1048_test` FOR EACH ROW begin
end;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.01 sec)

mysql> INSERT INTO error_1048_test(c1) VALUES ("a");
ERROR 1364 (HY000): Field 'c2' doesn't have a default value
mysql> set SESSION sql_mode = 'NO_ENGINE_SUBSTITUTION';
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.00 sec)

mysql> INSERT INTO error_1048_test(c1) VALUES ("a");
Query OK, 1 row affected, 1 warning (0.00 sec)

mysql> select * from error_1048_test;
+----+----+
| c1 | c2 |
+----+----+
| a  |    |
+----+----+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)

mysql> UPDATE error_1048_test SET c2 = 'b';
ERROR 1048 (23000): Column 'c2' cannot be null
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id));
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_test_BEFORE_INSERT BEFORE INSERT ON fuzz_test FOR EACH ROW SET NEW.value = CASE WHEN NEW.value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE NEW.value END;
INSERT INTO fuzz_test(name, value) VALUES ('test', NULL);
UPDATE fuzz_test SET value = 10.50 WHERE name = 'test';
key_bug_features: UPDATE after INSERT with NOT NULL field and trigger
